ListenStory.needSignInToListen: You need to be signed in to listen to stories.
ListenStory.newNarrationDescription: You can generate a new narration of your story with different voice characteristics.
ListenStory.replaceCurrentNarration: This will replace your current narration.
ListenStory.needMoreCredits: You need {credits} more credits to generate a new narration.
ListenStory.convertYourStory: Turn your story into an audiobook
ListenStory.convertDescription: The Mythoria elves will narrate it beautifully with the voice you choose.
ListenStory.priceLine: {cost, plural, one {# credit} other {# credits}} · Your balance: {balance}
ListenStory.createAudiobook: Create audiobook · {credits, plural, one {# credit} other {# credits}}
ListenStory.reNarrateLater: You can re-narrate with a different voice later.
ListenStory.checkingUpdates: Your audiobook will appear here automatically. You can also leave this page — it will be waiting in your story.
ListenStory.generationStarted: Audiobook generation started! The Mythoria elves will take about 5 minutes to narrate your story.
ListenStory.needMoreCreditsGenerate: You need {shortfall} more credits to generate an audiobook.
ListenStory.backgroundMusicDescription: Adds gentle ambient music that matches your story's mood.
